All Super Bear Adventure Redeem Codes (June 2026) - Free Rewards

Complete list of all working Super Bear Adventure redeem codes for June 2026. Get free coins, skins, hats, and exclusive rewards with these active codes.

June 13, 2026 Updated Jun 17, 2026 8 min read
Share:

What Are Redeem Codes in Super Bear Adventure?

Redeem codes are special promotional codes released by the developers of Super Bear Adventure that give players free in-game rewards. These rewards can include coins, exclusive skins, hats, stickers, and other collectibles that would otherwise take significant time to earn through normal gameplay.

The developers typically release new codes during special events, game updates, holidays, and community milestones. Some codes are permanent, while others expire after a limited time. That is why it is important to check back regularly and redeem codes as soon as they become available.

If you are new to the game, make sure to also read our beginner guide to understand the basics before diving into code redemption.

How to Redeem Codes in Super Bear Adventure

Redeeming codes in Super Bear Adventure is straightforward, but you need to know exactly where to go. Follow these steps carefully:

Step 1: Launch the Game

Open Super Bear Adventure on your device. Make sure you have the latest version installed. If you are running an older version, some codes may not work. Check our version changelogs to see if you are up to date.

Step 2: Access the Main Menu

From the main menu, look for the settings or options button. This is usually represented by a gear icon in the top-right corner of the screen.

Step 3: Find the Redeem Code Section

Inside the settings menu, scroll down until you find the “Redeem Code” or “Enter Code” option. Tap on it to open the code entry field.

Step 4: Enter the Code

Type or paste the code exactly as shown. Codes are usually case-sensitive, so make sure you enter uppercase and lowercase letters correctly. Do not add any extra spaces before or after the code.

Step 5: Confirm and Collect

Tap the “Redeem” or “Confirm” button. If the code is valid, your reward will be added to your inventory immediately. You will see a confirmation message showing what you received.

All Active Redeem Codes (June 2026)

Here are all the currently working redeem codes for Super Bear Adventure. We test these regularly and update the list whenever new codes are released or old ones expire.

These codes are tied to specific events and may expire when the event ends:

How Often Are New Codes Released?

The developers follow a somewhat irregular schedule for releasing codes. Based on past patterns, you can typically expect new codes during:

  • Major game updates: Every time a significant update drops, the developers usually release one or two codes to celebrate. Keep an eye on our version changelogs page for update news.
  • Holiday events: Christmas, Halloween, Easter, and summer holidays almost always bring special event codes.
  • Community milestones: When the game reaches download milestones or social media follower counts, celebration codes are released.
  • Developer livestreams: Occasionally, codes are revealed during developer streams or community events.

These codes have expired and can no longer be redeemed. We keep them listed here for reference so you know not to waste time trying them.

Tips for Getting the Most Out of Redeem Codes

Redeem Codes Immediately

The single most important tip is to redeem codes as soon as you learn about them. Many codes have limited lifespans, and some expire without warning. Do not save codes for later, as there is no benefit to waiting.

Combine Code Rewards with Smart Spending

The coins you receive from redeem codes can be put to excellent use. Check out our guide on unlocking all skins and hats to learn which cosmetics are the best value for your coins. If you want to maximize your coin income beyond codes, read our unlimited coins farming guide as well.

Check Multiple Sources

Codes are distributed across various channels. Follow the game’s official social media accounts, join community Discord servers, and check fan sites regularly. Our page here is updated frequently, but sometimes codes appear on other platforms first.

Common Code Entry Mistakes

If a code is not working, double-check the following:

  • Capitalization: Most codes are case-sensitive. BEARLOVE2026 is different from bearlove2026.
  • Spaces: Make sure there are no leading or trailing spaces when you paste a code.
  • Already redeemed: Each code can only be used once per account. If you have already redeemed it, you will see an error message.
  • Version requirement: Some codes require a minimum game version. Update your game to the latest version and try again.
  • Region restrictions: Rarely, some codes may be region-specific, though this is uncommon for Super Bear Adventure.

How Redeem Codes Work with the Mod APK

If you are using the Super Bear Adventure Mod APK, you might wonder whether redeem codes still work. The answer depends on the specific mod version you are running.

In most cases, redeem codes function normally with the mod APK since they are processed server-side. However, if you are using a version with unlimited money already enabled, the coin rewards from codes become less significant, though exclusive skins and hats from codes are still valuable since they cannot be obtained any other way.

For users running the mod menu version, you will find the redeem code option in the same location as the standard game. The mod menu does not interfere with the code redemption process.

Where to Find New Codes First

Official Channels

The fastest way to get new codes is through the game’s official channels:

  • Official Social Media: The developers post codes on their social media accounts.
  • In-Game Announcements: Sometimes codes are hidden in update notes or in-game news banners.
  • Community Discord: The official Discord server often gets codes before they appear anywhere else.

Community Sources

  • Reddit Communities: The Super Bear Adventure subreddit frequently shares new codes.
  • YouTube Content Creators: Gaming YouTubers who cover Super Bear Adventure often reveal codes in their videos.
  • Fan Wikis: Community wikis maintain code lists, though they may not always be as current as dedicated sites.

Frequently Asked Questions About Redeem Codes

Can I use the same code on multiple devices?

Yes, as long as each device has a different game account. If you are logged into the same account on multiple devices, the code can only be redeemed once across all devices tied to that account.

Do codes work on both Android and iOS?

Yes, redeem codes work on all platforms where Super Bear Adventure is available. Whether you are playing on Android, iOS, or even using our PC guide, the same codes apply.

Is there a limit to how many codes I can redeem?

There is no overall limit on the number of codes you can redeem. You can redeem every single active code on this list. The only restriction is that each individual code can be used once per account.

What happens if I redeem a code but do not see my reward?

If you successfully redeem a code but the reward does not appear, try the following:

  1. Restart the game completely.
  2. Check your inventory carefully, as some rewards like stickers may be in a different section.
  3. Ensure your internet connection is stable, as rewards are delivered from the server.
  4. If the issue persists, it may be a temporary server-side issue. Wait a few minutes and check again.

Can expired codes come back?

In rare cases, developers have reactivated expired codes during special events. However, this is uncommon, so do not count on it. Your best strategy is to redeem codes promptly when they are first released.

Maximize Your Super Bear Adventure Experience

Redeem codes are just one way to enhance your gameplay. For a complete understanding of everything the game has to offer, explore our other detailed guides:

  • Learn about every character and NPC in the game world.
  • Discover all secret areas and easter eggs hidden throughout the kingdoms.
  • Master every world with our walkthrough guides for Turtletown, Snow Valley, and Beemothep Desert.
  • Complete your collection with our all medals guide.

We update this page regularly as new codes are released. Bookmark this page and check back often to make sure you never miss a free reward in Super Bear Adventure.
